statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1248 — Bridge between chat-Claude's Tri (阿頼耶識/阿摩羅識/SELF⟲) and
              D-FUMT₈: All not8-fixed points are SelfClosed (BasisSink type
              structurally excluded by Belnap involution)
              — Axiom-Free / [propext] only in Lean 4

  Trigger: 2026-07-02 chat-Claude 6 turn arc + AmalaFixpoint.lean 完了後、
  藤本さん 「(C) STEP 1246+1247 との bridge lemma」 判断。

  Setting:
    * chat-Claude AmalaFixpoint.lean (ReiAIOS.Madhyamaka namespace):
      - Tri = {vessel, base, selfLoop}
      - R : Tri → Tri (NOT involution: R vessel = base, R (R vessel) = base ≠ vessel)
      - IsBasisSink

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
